final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original illustration of a cyberpunk city street scene set in Neo-Tokyo, year 2077, at night.

Style/medium: detailed digital illustration, painterly editorial style referencing the visual aesthetics of Blade Runner 2049 — dense layered composition, heavy atmospheric haze, saturated neon against deep shadow
Composition: extreme deep focus from foreground street stalls receding to skyscrapers disappearing in smog on the horizon; mid-height eye-level viewpoint along a narrow crowded alley; wide-angle perspective with strong vanishing point
Subject: a narrow, densely packed neon street — Japanese women in traditional kimono fitted with high-tech cybernetic prosthetics; augmented construction workers in worn overalls with visible body modifications; holographic virtual idol performers projected mid-air; delivery drones weaving overhead; floating advertisement billboards cycling product ads; pedestrians shoulder-to-shoulder filling every inch of the street
Scene/backdrop: Neo-Tokyo street, 2077, deep night; towering buildings on both sides plastered floor-to-ceiling with neon signs in Japanese, Chinese, and English; smog-filled sky barely visible above; puddles on wet pavement perfectly mirroring all neon light in a dreamlike reflection
Lighting/mood: neon-saturated night — dominant pink, cyan-blue, and amber-orange neon signs illuminate the street as bright as daylight; layered light sources from signs, hologram projections, and drone navigation lights; moody, oppressive yet electric atmosphere — futuristic and apocalyptic simultaneously
Color palette: hot pink and cyan-blue as dominant neon anchors, amber-orange as accent warmth, deep charcoal and near-black as shadow base, all reflected and doubled in wet ground puddles
Materials/textures: wet asphalt with mirror-like puddle reflections, worn fabric and rusted metal on workers' gear, glossy cybernetic limb surfaces, translucent hologram light diffusion, dense layered signage surfaces
Text (verbatim): 日文、中文、英文霓虹招牌（内容自由生成，风格一致）
Constraints: maintain extreme scene density and detail depth throughout the full frame; foreground-to-background depth must be legible; neon reflections on wet ground are mandatory visual element
Avoid: clean utopian aesthetics; sparse or minimal composition; daylight or warm natural sunlight; generic sci-fi blue monochrome; flat cel-shading; watermark; empty streets
